steps.title: Use the percent per serving
steps.content: Each serving provides $6\%$ of the daily potassium allowance. The variable $p$ is already measured in percent, so each serving adds $6$ to $p$, not $0.06$.

steps.title: Scale by servings
steps.content:
For $x$ servings, multiply the percent per serving by $x$.
$$p=6x$$
The answer is B.
